heading: “We understand your desire to hear MAA”
text: RajIVF – Best IVF Centre in Navi Mumbai – Best IVF Centre in Navi Mumbai Open/Close Menu Best IVF Centre in Navi Mumbai Skip to content Home About Us About Doctor Our Team About Our Clinic Treatments FAQ Contact   Working Time Monday – Friday – 8.00 – 17.00 Saturday – 9.30 – 17.30 Sunday – Contingency Learn more →  State of art IVF centre Welcome to our new spacious, state of art IVF centre where we offer you advanced infertility treatment options like IVF, ICSI, LAH (Laser assisted Hatching), Embryo freezing, FET (Frozen Embryo Transfers), Donor Egg cycles. About Clinic →  Are “U” on Right Track Wide experience of having treated more than thousands of patients. Read More→  Consult Now +91-9930710070 Book an Appointment. Monday – Saturday 10:30 AM – 08:00 PM Call us now → Welcome to RAJ IVF Center Welcome to our new spacious, state of art IVF centre where we offer you advanced infertility treatment options like IVF, ICSI, LAH (Laser assisted Hatching), Embryo freezing, FET (Frozen Embryo Transfers), surgical sperm recovery (TESA, TESE, PESA, MESA), Donor Egg cycles along with IUI and Therapeutic Donor inseminations. All under one roof treatment of infertility, we have, well equipped laboratory for us to evaluate you for routine and advanced hormone tests (we do have an additional advantage of getting some hormone test results in few hours so that we can plan our cycle better), an OT complex with dedicated Endoscopy unit where we do perform diagnostic laparoscopy and hysteroscopy, LOD (laparoscopic ovarian drilling) Cornual cannulation for proximal tubal blocks and Fertility enhancing surgeries. Tubal microsurgery is offered to needy patients. Out of city/overseas patients can contact us for accommodation. Treatments→ Embryo Freezing Male Infertility Evaluation Surgical Sperm Extraction – (TESA, TESE, PESA) Therapeutic Donor Insemination IVF (In-Vitro Fertilization) Laser Assisted Hatching Intracytoplasmic Sperm Injection (ICSI) IUI (Intrauterine Insemination) Fertility Enhancing Surgery Webinar on Linux - Laboratories held on 2nd December 2023 “We understand your desire to hear MAA” About us Affordable IVF Centre in Navi Mumbai. Headed by Dr. Shyam Kulkarni who has been practicing infertility since 33 years. Modern Infrastructure and Technology Done more than 11500 IUIs and 2000 ART procedures Out of city/overseas patients can contact us for accommodation. Meet Our Doctors Director RAJ IVF Dr. Shyam Kulkarni  33 years experience • MBBS (1983) Karnataka Medical College • Passed DNB (OBGYN) in 1987 held at AIIMS Delhi. Andrologist Dr. Sanish Shringarpure  13 years experience • Urologist and Andrologist Embryologist Ms. Heena Shaikh  11 years experience • Embryologist Raj IVF State of art IVF centre - Advanced Infertility Treatment Welcome to our new spacious, state of art IVF centre where we offer you advanced infertility treatment options like IVF, ICSI, LAH (Laser assisted Hatching), Embryo freezing, FET (Frozen Embryo Transfers), Donor Egg cycles.
